title: Production Health Check Skill
summary: Provides Python scripts and guidance for running HTTP health checks against production service endpoints and fetching recent logs. Designed for on-call engineers, CI/CD pipelines, and runbooks.
author: Platform Engineering
knowledgeGraph:
graph TD
  A[On-Call / CI-CD] --> B{Run health_check.py}
  B -->|HTTP GET| C[Health Endpoint]
  C --> D[Status Code]
  C --> E[Latency]
  C --> F[JSON Validation]
  D & E & F --> G{All OK?}
  G -->|Yes| H[Service Healthy]
  G -->|No| I[Escalate / Alert]
  A --> J{Run get_logs.py}
  J -->|HTTP GET| K[Logs Endpoint]
  K --> L[Recent Log Lines]
  L --> M[Investigate]
  I --> M
  M --> N[Runbook / Postmortem]
